$schema_doc: See scripts/cousin_review/task.md for the full schema. Each entry in 'cousins' describes a third-party repo that contains Rust code in explicitly whitelisted subpaths. Nothing is touched unless it is opted-in via 'targets[].applies' or 'global_applies'. 'forbidden_paths' is a belt-and-suspenders hard deny list. 'targets[].check' overrides the default check command for that subpath.

$example.name: acme-monorepo
$example.notes: Bazel-based monorepo. CI is Bazel-managed — never touch .github or root configs.
